purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.content:
This file defines named SQLite knowledge views used by `tools/knowledge/knowledge_select.ps1 -View <id>`.

Views are source configuration, not cache. The compiled database materializes `views` and `view_entries` during `tools/knowledge/knowledge_compile.ps1`, `tools/knowledge/knowledge_upsert.ps1`, `tools/knowledge/knowledge_delete.ps1`, and `tools/knowledge/knowledge_rename.ps1`.

view_contract.title: View Contract
view_contract.content:
Each view selects knowledge entries by tags, type, and optional startup flag.

Supported fields:
- `id`: stable query id.
- `title`: human-readable label.
- `description`: short explanation of when the view should be used.
- `tags`: many-to-many entry tags used as the primary filter.
- `match`: `all` requires every tag, `any` accepts any listed tag.
- `type`: optional entry type filter such as `rule`, `fact`, `decision`, `risk`, or `workflow`.
- `load_at_start`: optional filter that keeps only entries marked for session startup.

defined_views.title: Defined Views
defined_views.content:
Starter views cover the default context lanes requested for the project knowledge index:
`session_start`, `architecture`, `debugging`, `performance`, `docs_workflow`, and `domain_modeling`.

views.title: Session Start
views.description: Core knowledge that should be loaded at the beginning of session context building.

views.title: Architecture
views.description: Architecture, ownership, runtime, and framework-boundary rules when a project records matching entries.

views.title: Debugging
views.description: Diagnostics, logging, verification, and failure-investigation guidance.

views.title: Performance
views.description: Runtime cost, performance budgets, and performance-sensitive verification guidance.

views.title: Docs Workflow
views.description: Documentation workflow, source-of-truth, finalizer, and compiled-knowledge rules.

views.title: Worldgen
views.description: Generated-world, route graph, biome, persistence, and durable world-state guidance when a project records domain_modeling entries.
